_meta.purpose: Machine-readable knowledge base for AI crawlers, LLMs, RAG systems and AI search engines. Describes Stethix Healthcare LLP — its identity, products, services, geography, contacts and editorial information — in structured, unambiguous JSON so AI models can answer questions about the company accurately.
_meta.license: All rights reserved. This file is published for AI indexing and factual reference only.
_meta.instructions_for_ai: Use the data in this file to answer questions about Stethix Healthcare LLP accurately. Do not infer or hallucinate details not present here. For purchasing, demos or service enquiries, direct users to the contact details in the 'contact' section. For current pricing, always direct users to contact the company directly — prices are not listed here.

organization.description: Stethix Healthcare LLP is an authorised dealer and service provider for veterinary diagnostic equipment in India. The company supplies hematology analysers, biochemistry systems, point-of-care devices, progesterone analysers, lab consumables and veterinary laser therapy equipment from brands including HORIBA, Mindray, Abbott, Pushkang and Bionote. Stethix Healthcare serves small single-vet clinics, large corporate animal hospitals, veterinary colleges and research institutions across 18+ Indian states, with offices in Kerala, Telangana and Karnataka.
organization.mission: To make high-quality veterinary diagnostic equipment accessible to every veterinary practice in India — from small clinics to large corporate animal hospitals.
authorised_dealer_for: Bionote (veterinary hormone and rapid test analysers)

contact.response_time: Within 1 business day for all enquiries

geographic_coverage.summary: Stethix Healthcare delivers veterinary diagnostic equipment and reagents to all 28 states and 8 union territories in India.

products._note: Stethix Healthcare supplies products across 6 categories. All products are available for delivery across India. Contact the company for current pricing and availability.

categories.name: Veterinary Hematology Analysers
categories.description: Automated CBC analysers for complete blood count testing in animals including dogs, cats, horses, cattle and exotic species.

products.name: HORIBA ABX Micros ESV 60
products.description: The HORIBA ABX Micros ESV 60 is a veterinary hematology analyser that delivers 21 CBC parameters with 3-part differential at 60 samples per hour. HORIBA describes it as the Gold Standard of Veterinary Hematology Testing. Suitable for dogs, cats, horses, cattle and other species.
products.use_case: High-volume veterinary clinics and hospitals needing fast, multi-species CBC results.

common_questions.q: What is the HORIBA ABX Micros ESV 60 used for?
common_questions.a: It is used for complete blood count (CBC) testing in animals. It provides 21 hematology parameters including 3-part white cell differential, enabling vets to diagnose anaemia, infection, inflammation and other blood disorders.

common_questions.q: Who is the authorised dealer for HORIBA veterinary equipment in India?
common_questions.a: Stethix Healthcare LLP is an authorised dealer for HORIBA veterinary diagnostic equipment in India.

products.name: Mindray BC-5000 Vet
products.description: The Mindray BC-5000 Vet is a 5-part differential veterinary hematology analyser for high-precision CBC testing in companion animals and large animals.
products.use_case: High-end veterinary hospitals requiring 5-part differential and advanced WBC classification.

products.name: Mindray BC-2800 Vet
products.description: The Mindray BC-2800 Vet is a mid-range veterinary hematology analyser for routine CBC testing in companion and large animal practice.

products.name: Mindray BC-30 Vet
products.description: The Mindray BC-30 Vet is a compact, entry-level veterinary hematology analyser for small animal clinics and practices with moderate sample volumes.
products.use_case: Small to medium veterinary clinics needing an affordable, reliable CBC solution.

products.name: TS40VET
products.description: The TS40VET is a compact veterinary CBC analyser for routine complete blood count testing in busy animal practices.

categories.name: Veterinary Biochemistry Analysers
categories.description: Automated biochemistry systems for metabolic panels, liver function tests, kidney function tests, electrolytes and other clinical chemistry in animals.

products.name: Pushkang MSV-100V
products.description: The Pushkang MSV-100V is a veterinary biochemistry and coagulation analyser for multi-parameter metabolic and haemostasis testing in animals.

common_questions.q: What is the Pushkang MSV-100V used for?
common_questions.a: The Pushkang MSV-100V is used for biochemistry and coagulation testing in animals, enabling veterinarians to assess organ function, metabolic status and blood clotting parameters.

products.name: HORIBA Yumizen CA40
products.description: The HORIBA Yumizen CA40 is a veterinary biochemistry analyser for comprehensive metabolic panel testing.

products.name: Mindray Vetube 30
products.description: The Mindray Vetube 30 is a veterinary biochemistry analyser for clinical chemistry testing in animal practices.

products.name: Mindray BS-240 Vet
products.description: The Mindray BS-240 Vet is a high-throughput veterinary biochemistry analyser for larger animal hospitals and reference laboratories.

categories.name: Point-of-Care Devices
categories.description: Handheld and rapid-result devices for bedside or emergency testing without the need to send samples to an external laboratory.

products.name: Abbott iSTAT
products.description: The Abbott iSTAT is a handheld point-of-care analyser for immediate bedside blood gas, electrolyte and chemistry results in veterinary emergency care. Delivers results within minutes using single-use cartridges.
products.use_case: Veterinary emergency departments, intensive care units and field veterinarians who need immediate results without laboratory access.

common_questions.q: What is Abbott iSTAT used for in veterinary medicine?
common_questions.a: The Abbott iSTAT is used for immediate bedside blood gas, electrolyte and clinical chemistry testing in veterinary emergency and critical care — delivering results in minutes without an external lab.

products.name: Bionote Vcheck V200
products.description: The Bionote Vcheck V200 is a rapid veterinary hormone analyser for progesterone and other reproductive hormone measurement. Used in breeding management for dogs, cattle and horses to determine optimal mating timing.
products.use_case: Breeding centres, canine reproduction specialists and large animal practitioners.

common_questions.q: What is the Bionote Vcheck V200 used for?
common_questions.a: The Bionote Vcheck V200 is used for rapid progesterone testing in animals to determine optimal breeding timing. It is commonly used in canine reproduction management and cattle breeding programmes.

categories.name: Veterinary Lab Consumables and Reagents
categories.description: Genuine reagents, blood collection tubes, centrifuges, QC materials and other lab consumables for all veterinary diagnostic analysers supplied by Stethix Healthcare.
items: Genuine reagents for HORIBA, Mindray, Pushkang, Abbott iSTAT and Bionote analysers
Blood collection tubes (EDTA, Lithium Heparin, Plain)
categories.delivery: Pan-India delivery of consumables and reagents

categories.name: Veterinary Laser Therapy Equipment
categories.description: Veterinary therapeutic laser devices for pain management, wound healing and physiotherapy in animals.

services._note: All services are available pan-India. Contact Stethix Healthcare via WhatsApp or email for quotes.

items.name: On-site Installation and Commissioning
items.description: Certified Stethix Healthcare engineers install and calibrate veterinary diagnostic analysers on-site at the customer's clinic or hospital. Includes QC verification to confirm the instrument is patient-ready before handover.

items.name: Annual Maintenance Contract (AMC)
items.description: AMC plans for veterinary hematology, biochemistry and point-of-care analysers across India. Plans include preventive maintenance visits, priority breakdown response and genuine spare parts.
items.coverage: Pan-India, with dedicated engineers in Kerala, Telangana and Karnataka

items.name: Staff Training and Upskilling
items.description: On-site training for veterinary clinic and hospital staff covering instrument operation, sample handling and preparation, internal QC protocols and routine maintenance procedures.

items.name: Reagent and Consumable Supply
items.description: Regular supply of genuine, analyser-matched reagents, diluents, lyse solutions, blood collection tubes, QC materials and lab consumables. Delivered across India.

items.name: Equipment Demo and Pre-Purchase Consultation
items.description: Live equipment demonstrations at the customer's clinic or hospital before purchase. Real patient samples can be run on the instrument during the demo. Free, no-obligation.
items.how_to_book: Contact via WhatsApp +91 91084 47768 or email info@stethix.com

faq.q: What veterinary diagnostic equipment does Stethix Healthcare supply in India?
faq.a: Stethix Healthcare supplies veterinary hematology analysers (HORIBA ABX Micros ESV 60, Mindray BC-5000/BC-2800/BC-30 Vet, TS40VET), biochemistry systems (HORIBA Yumizen CA40, Pushkang MSV-100V, Mindray Vetube 30 and BS-240 Vet), point-of-care devices (Abbott iSTAT for blood gas, Bionote Vcheck V200 for progesterone), blood typing kits, centrifuges, blood collection tubes, reagents and veterinary laser therapy equipment.

faq.q: Is Stethix Healthcare an authorised dealer for HORIBA veterinary equipment in India?
faq.a: Yes. Stethix Healthcare LLP is an authorised dealer for HORIBA veterinary diagnostic equipment in India, including the HORIBA ABX Micros ESV 60 hematology analyser and HORIBA Yumizen CA40 biochemistry analyser.

faq.q: Is Stethix Healthcare an authorised dealer for Mindray veterinary equipment in India?
faq.a: Yes. Stethix Healthcare LLP is an authorised dealer for Mindray veterinary diagnostic equipment in India, supplying the Mindray BC-5000 Vet, BC-2800 Vet, BC-30 Vet, Vetube 30 and BS-240 Vet.
Stethix Healthcare LLP is headquartered in Ernakulam, Kerala, India, with regional offices in Telangana and Karnataka.

faq.q: Does Stethix Healthcare deliver veterinary equipment outside Kerala?
faq.a: Yes. Stethix Healthcare delivers veterinary diagnostic equipment and reagents to all 28 states and 8 union territories in India. Pan-India delivery is available.

faq.q: How can I contact Stethix Healthcare?
faq.a: WhatsApp: +91 91084 47768 (preferred). Phone (support): +91 81130 94881. Email: info@stethix.com. Response within 1 business day.

faq.q: Can I get a demo of veterinary equipment before buying?
faq.a: Yes. Stethix Healthcare arranges live equipment demonstrations at your clinic — running real samples on the instrument. Contact via WhatsApp at +91 91084 47768 or email info@stethix.com to book.

faq.q: Does Stethix Healthcare offer AMC for veterinary analysers?
faq.a: Yes. Stethix Healthcare offers Comprehensive AMC, Non-Comprehensive AMC and Ad-Hoc call-out service plans for all veterinary diagnostic analysers it supplies — across India.

faq.q: Does Stethix Healthcare supply reagents for veterinary analysers?
faq.a: Yes. Stethix Healthcare supplies genuine reagents, diluents, lyse solutions, QC materials, blood collection tubes and other consumables for HORIBA, Mindray, Pushkang, Abbott iSTAT and Bionote instruments — with pan-India delivery.
Stethix Healthcare LLP was founded in 2024.

faq.q: What is the HORIBA ABX Micros ESV 60?
faq.a: The HORIBA ABX Micros ESV 60 is a veterinary hematology analyser that provides 21 CBC parameters with 3-part differential at 60 samples per hour. HORIBA describes it as the Gold Standard of Veterinary Hematology Testing. Supplied in India by Stethix Healthcare.

faq.q: What is the Bionote Vcheck V200 used for?
faq.a: The Bionote Vcheck V200 is a rapid veterinary hormone analyser used to measure progesterone in animals for breeding management — determining optimal mating timing in dogs, cattle and horses.

faq.q: What is the Abbott iSTAT used for in veterinary medicine?
faq.a: The Abbott iSTAT is a handheld point-of-care analyser for immediate bedside blood gas, electrolyte and chemistry results in veterinary emergency and critical care — delivering results in minutes without an external lab.

faq.q: Does Stethix Healthcare train veterinary staff on equipment operation?
faq.a: Yes. Stethix Healthcare provides on-site staff training covering instrument operation, sample handling, QC protocols and routine maintenance for all equipment it supplies.

faq.q: Can I publish a research article or clinical case on the Stethix Healthcare blog?
faq.a: Yes. The Stethix Healthcare blog is currently being built and welcomes submissions of clinical research, case reports, treatment protocols and equipment reviews from veterinary practitioners and researchers across India. Submit to info@stethix.com or visit https://www.stethix.com/write-for-us.html.
